skill1.kitLine: Unchanging Heart: Gain Indomitability for 9 sec. Activates 1 time(s) during battle.
skill1.note: Defensive survival buff; skipped per note (no damage impact).

skill1.kitLine: Damage dealt when attacking core ▲ 25.15% for 5 sec (when Memory Absorption takes effect, all allies).
skill1.note: Fires every 3s, so treated as a permanent passive ally buff (note).

skill1.kitLine: ATK ▲ 30.16% of the skill user's ATK for 5 sec (all allies).
skill1.note: Same every-3s trigger -> permanent passive; casterAtkPct = % of caster ATK.

skill1.kitLine: Equally shares HP recovery for 5 sec (all allies).
Recovers 25% of the skill user's final Max HP as HP (self).
Deals 150% of final ATK as damage (Full Charge while in Memory Incineration, all enemies).
skill1.note: Only exists during the 10s swap; modeled as per-full-charge rider. 150 folded into 530.46 (=150+380.46) per tier-audit fix.

skill1.kitLine: Deals 380.46% of final ATK as additional damage (enemy is the stage target).
skill1.note: Tier-audit fix: lands on EVERY full charge during SR mode (Prydwen), folded into the per-shot rider (150+380.46). Scope still flagged uncertain in note.

skill2.kitLine: Memory Absorption: Hit Rate ▲ 1.4%, stacks up to 30, immune to stack-count change, cannot be removed (every 3s, self).
skill2.note: The stack gauge itself; Hit Rate is inert for damage in the sim (note). Stack gates are modeled separately in skill2[0].
Time-averaged from 15.2 for the >2-stack ramp (note tier-audit fix #2), not full-from-t0.

skill2.kitLine: Stage 3 (≥30 stacks): damage dealt when attacking core ▲ 21.05% continuously.
skill2.note: Time-averaged from 21.05 for the >30-stack ramp (~90s of a 180s fight).

burst.kitLine: Deals 645.33% of final ATK as Burst Skill damage (all enemies).
Memory Incineration: weapon swap — Charge time fixed 1.8s, Damage 275.18% of final ATK, Full Charge 250% of Damage, Duration 10s.
burst.where: burst[2] weaponSwap damagePct 275.18 / chargeTimeSec 2.13 / chargeMultPct 250 / weapon SR / 10s
burst.note: SR class-override added 2026-07-17 (was range-banded+core-rated as base SMG). chargeTimeSec held at 2.13 not 1.8: swaps exempt from engine auto SR bolt-recovery, so the +0.5s cycle is folded into charge time (do not double-count).

documentedConfounds.text: 380.46% 'additional damage vs stage target' block scope is genuinely ambiguous (one-time vs per-full-charge vs broader per-attack rider). Tier-audit chose per-full-charge (folded into 530.46 rider); earlier one-hit-per-burst reading was conservative and may have under-counted.
documentedConfounds.why: Directly scales her swap-shot damage every full charge; a wrong scope reading moves her share materially. Author flags it as not-yet-faithful.

documentedConfounds.text: chargeTimeSec kept at 2.13 vs measured/prose 1.8s (kit-status finding F2). Cycle folded into charge time because swaps are exempt from engine auto SR bolt-recovery.
documentedConfounds.why: Charge cadence sets the number of full-charge hits (each carrying the 530.46 rider) inside the 10s window; a wrong cycle time directly changes swap-shot count.

documentedConfounds.text: Memory Absorption Hit Rate ▲1.4% ×30 (42% at cap) dropped (kit-status finding F3).
documentedConfounds.why: Hit Rate is inert for damage in this sim's model; dropping it should not shift predicted damage.

documentedConfounds.text: Memory Absorption stack-gate ramp (>2 @~9s, >10 @~30s, >30 @~90s of 180s) handled as time-averaged buffs (14.4/16.8/10.5) rather than full-from-t0 or a true ramp.
documentedConfounds.why: A deliberate, documented averaging approximation; could bias either direction slightly but is an explicit author choice, not a silent drop.

documentedConfounds.text: Indomitability (9s, 1×), shared HP recovery (5s), and self 25% Max-HP heal skipped.
documentedConfounds.why: Purely defensive/survival effects with no damage contribution in a partless-boss DPS sim.

authorIntentSummary: The author models Nayuta as a wind Supporter whose S1 ally buffs (core-damage 25.15%, caster-ATK 30.16%) are permanent passives (they refresh every 3s via Memory Absorption), and whose S2 stack gates are time-averaged permanent self buffs (14.4/16.8/10.5) rather than a true ramp. The burst is fully modeled: team Attack Damage 35.45%/15s, a 645.33% nuke, and the Memory Incineration SR weapon swap (275.18% dmg, 250% full-charge, 10s, unlimited ammo, SR class-override added 2026-07-17 to fix a ~2x far/midfar undercount). S1's full-charge riders (150% + 380.46% stage-target) are folded into one extraHitDamagePct 530.46/10s per-full-charge buff. Known-not-yet-faithful spots per the note: the ambiguous scope of the 380.46% block, the chargeTimeSec 2.13-vs-1.8 discrepancy (F2), and the dropped Hit-Rate cap (F3); residual 0.897 COLD is attributed to these and explicitly not re-fudged.
